title.rendered: Helijet Celebrates Canada Day with a Sky-High Tribute to the Maple Leaf

content.rendered:
No flagpole flies the Canadian flag higher than this!

With a giant Canadian flag splashed across the body, accompanied by the phrase “True North Strong and Free”, Helijet International proudly launches a new “Team Canada” look today for one of its Sikorsky S-76 passenger helicopters.
The refreshed look helicopter is scheduled to run throughout Canada Day between Helijet’s downtown Vancouver and Victoria terminals and will be hard to miss for anyone seeing it on approach or take off.
“We decided to launch this new livery on Canada Day as a bold statement to affirm that Helijet is a proudly Canadian company,” said Danny Sitnam, President and CEO of Helijet International. “We think there’s no bigger statement we could make than flying the Maple Leaf flag high in the sky on our routes over the BC coast from this day forward to serve as a constant reminder of our collective Team Canada spirit.”
For media release (pdf) Click Here
